name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Is this related to a health condition or workflow issue?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could work.

## Platform

- [ ] iOS
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] watchOS
- [ ] All

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or extra details.
